nodeGroups.description: Worker node groups of the ComputePlane cluster (cluster shape only — the security posture is fixed by the module and cannot be overridden through this knob; note that unlisted `NodeGroup` fields pass through to the wrapped chart unvalidated). Same structure as the `kubernetes` application's `nodeGroups`. When left empty, the wrapped `kubernetes` chart emits its default scale-from-zero `md0` group with `roles: [ingress-nginx]`, so the cluster sits idle until a pending Pod (e.g. the ingress-nginx controller) triggers the cluster-autoscaler. Supplied groups are authoritative (not merged with the default), so at least one of them must carry `roles: [ingress-nginx]` — enforced at render time.

diskSize.description: System disk size for the worker VM. Carries the Talos OS image, kubelet state, containerd image cache, and any local-path PVCs.

gpus.description: List of GPUs to attach (NVIDIA driver requires at least 4 GiB RAM).

kubelet.description: Kubelet resource reservations for this node group.

evictionHardMemory.description: Hard eviction threshold for memory (absolute like 200Mi or percentage like 7%).

evictionSoftMemory.description: Soft eviction threshold for memory (absolute like 1Gi or percentage like 10%).

kubeReservedCpu.description: CPU reserved for kubelet and container runtime. Auto-computed from instanceType if empty.

kubeReservedMemory.description: Memory reserved for kubelet and container runtime. Auto-computed from instanceType if empty.

systemReservedCpu.description: CPU reserved for host OS. Auto-computed from instanceType if empty.

systemReservedMemory.description: Memory reserved for host OS. Auto-computed from instanceType if empty.

resources.description: Explicit CPU and memory for each worker node, as an alternative to `instanceType` sizing. Set both `cpu` and `memory` together or neither.

roles.description: List of node roles. At least one group must carry `ingress-nginx` — the module pins the ingress-nginx addon on, and its controller only schedules onto nodes with that role (enforced at render time).

storageClass.description: StorageClass for worker node persistent disks. When empty, falls back to the application-level storageClass of the wrapped kubernetes app.
